_doc: GitHub Ruleset for the anchor/* tag namespace. Prevents accidental or malicious tampering with canary anchor tags. Apply per caller repo: gh api -X POST /repos/<owner>/<repo>/rulesets --input docs/canary-tag-ruleset.json. SETUP: Resolve the smd-ci-agora App's installation id for this repo (gh api /repos/<owner>/<repo>/installation --jq .id), substitute for <BYPASS_APP_INSTALLATION_ID>. The App is granted bypass so canary-purge-orphans can delete orphan tags at runtime. No human-level bypass: human-driven tag deletes are blocked by design.
name: history-canary-anchors
